sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75391" key="o)rtugokopiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρτῠγοκοπ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n75391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skilled in the game,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">108</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
